tools.name: runtime_create_session
tools.description: Create a disposable E2B Worker Sandbox session for isolated code execution

timeoutMs.description: Optional worker session timeout in milliseconds

taskLabel.description: Optional label or short task description

tools.name: runtime_list_sessions
tools.description: List all active and recent worker runtime sessions owned by this controller

tools.name: runtime_get_session
tools.description: Retrieve state and lifecycle information for a specific runtime session

tools.name: runtime_run_command
tools.description: Execute a terminal command inside the specified worker sandbox restricted to /workspace

tools.name: runtime_destroy_session
tools.description: Idempotently kill and destroy a worker sandbox session

sessionId.description: Opaque runtime session ID to destroy

tools.name: runtime_release_readiness
tools.description: Retrieve the honest release readiness state, evaluated commits, passed/failed release gates, and verified telemetry details
